title: DailyTokenUsage
description: Usage plus poster presentation fields. Agent-created poster links must include funLine, verdict, energyLine, and exactly three energyComparisons; those fields remain schema-optional only so older links and direct manual/CLI flows continue to render.

cachedTokens.description: Deprecated compatibility field. Prefer cacheReadTokens plus cacheCreationTokens; this field is treated as cacheReadTokens by the page.

cacheCreationTokens.description: Tokens used to create cache entries. Energy is closer to input/prefill work than cache reads.

cacheReadTokens.description: Tokens read from an existing cache, typically much cheaper than input prefill or output generation.

metricIds.description: Legacy fixed-card fallback. Agents creating poster links must use energyComparisons instead.

scope.description: day: full-day usage; session: current conversation only (the poster titles itself accordingly).

funLine.description: Fresh Agent-written token-volume metaphor for this exact report, rendered verbatim under the token count. Mandatory for Agent-created links; optional only for legacy/manual compatibility.

verdict.description: Fresh short playful verdict tailored to this report's magnitude. Do not include quote marks. Mandatory for Agent-created links.

energyLine.description: Fresh short sentence connecting the work to the computed energy. Mandatory for Agent-created links.

energyComparisons.description: Exactly three fresh, distinct energy comparisons invented by the Agent for this report. The page divides total kWh by whPerUnit; do not send precomputed counts.

usageEvidence.description: Human-readable evidence for the usage source, such as a runtime usage object, CLI token line, trace id, provider usage query, or the derivation method for a conversation-derived estimate.
